subcodes.first_line: O Hands of the Cause of God! For some time no letter hath been received from you, nor hath any news arrived. The affairs which engage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایادی امرالله مدتیست نامه ای از شما نرسیده و خبری نیامده اموری که گرفتار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @Hands of the Cause
